sample_requests: Transfer labels from a reference AnnData to a query AnnData with OmicVerse
Convert the OmicVerse reference annotation notebook into a reusable skill

smoke_commands.name: synthetic-harmony-transfer
smoke_commands.command:
${PYTHON} - <<'PY'
from __future__ import annotations

import json
import os
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import anndata as ad

os.environ.setdefault("MPLCONFIGDIR", "/tmp/mpl")
os.environ.setdefault("NUMBA_CACHE_DIR", "/tmp/numba")

from omicverse.single._annotation_ref import AnnotationRef

rng = np.random.default_rng(0)
ngenes = 80
nq = 30
nr = 30
genes = [f"G{i}" for i in range(ngenes)]
query = ad.AnnData(X=rng.poisson(5, (nq, ngenes)).astype(float))
ref = ad.AnnData(X=rng.poisson(5, (nr, ngenes)).astype(float))
query.var_names = genes
ref.var_names = genes
query.obs_names = [f"q{i}" for i in range(nq)]
ref.obs_names = [f"r{i}" for i in range(nr)]
ref.obs["celltype"] = pd.Categorical(["T cell"] * 10 + ["B cell"] * 10 + ["Mono"] * 10)

ar = AnnotationRef(query, ref, celltype_key="celltype")
ar.preprocess(mode="shiftlog|pearson", n_HVGs=60, batch_key="integrate_batch")
ar.train(method="harmony", n_pcs=20)
ad_pred = ar.predict(method="harmony", n_neighbors=5)

summary = {
    "shape": list(ad_pred.shape),
    "prediction_cols": [c for c in ad_pred.obs.columns if "prediction" in c or "uncertainty" in c],
    "obsm_keys": [k for k in ad_pred.obsm.keys() if "harmony" in k or k == "X_pca"],
    "harmony_prediction": "harmony_prediction" in ad_pred.obs,
    "harmony_uncertainty": "harmony_uncertainty" in ad_pred.obs,
    "x_pca_harmony_anno": "X_pca_harmony_anno" in ad_pred.obsm,
    "pred_unique_count": int(ad_pred.obs["harmony_prediction"].astype(str).nunique()),
}
print(json.dumps(summary, sort_keys=True))
PY
